entries.notes: Boys trip / sauna session. 50 push-ups (in sauna), 20 bench dips (lean-back), 30 bicycle crunches (slow clean form), ~20 V-ups to failure (full body extension to pike). Abs sore through Mon.
Airport travel day. 90 clean lunges. Quads sore Mon.
Warm-up / activation only. 2 sets of 5 pull-ups (reps 4-5 form-break each set). Dead hang stretch for back. Not a real programmed session.

i did 5 pull ups 4 times.  5th one was weak.  4th was questionable.  did half ranged pistol squats 10 per leg 2x.  felt good tension, stopped before any pain or fear of overdoing it.  trying to avoid injury at all costs and taking it one step at a time.  felt good but was mentally blocked all morning was barely able to get myself motivated.
